description: Sidecar index manifest for AI-ChordCraft guitar voicing layers.

files.musical_taxonomy.json: Chord family, quality, and harmony-tier indexes.
files.guitar_playability.json: Difficulty, position, shape, and playability-tier indexes.
files.release_review_pools.json: Release layer and review-priority indexes for curation.
files.style_fit.json: Style fit indexes for pop, rock, rnb, blues, and funk.
files.voice_leading.json: Bass-note and top-note indexes for transition planning.
